nasb.text: Also Jonathan, David’s uncle, was a counselor, a man of understanding, and a scribe; and Jehiel the son of Hachmoni tutored the king’s sons.

esv.text: Jonathan, David’s uncle, was a counselor, being a man of understanding and a scribe. He and Jehiel the son of Hachmoni attended the king’s sons.

cnv.text: 大衛的叔父約拿單是一個謀士；這人很有智慧，又是一個經學家；哈摩尼的兒子耶歇是王眾子的老師。

ccb.text: 大卫的叔叔约拿单很精明，任谋士和书记。哈摩尼的儿子耶歇做众王子的老师。
